name: academorix/region
purpose: Region aggregate — commercial + regulatory zone (currency, tax, timezone, locale) each Branch cascades through, one default region auto-provisioned per Tenant.
capabilities: Region Eloquent model (reg_...) with ISO currency + tz + locale
when_to_use: Modelling a tenant that operates across markets with different currencies or tax regimes.
when_not_to_use: For structural sub-brands (marketing / P&L), use the sibling academorix/organization package.
